target: inform the appropriate tools and information to retrieve (e.g., compensation rules are only applicable for certain disruptions).
content_preview: The agent must use the appropriate tools to provide compensation rules when requested by the user, rather than responding with a verbal inquiry for more information.

target: Use the provided booking reference or passenger details to look up the affected itinerary.
content_preview: Ensure all necessary parameters are included in tool calls, such as disruption type, origin/destination, and passenger information, to avoid any missed details during the solution retrieval process.

target: If after investigating, no suitable rebooking options or compensation information can be found, the agent must clearly state this to the user and explain why.
